title: Brunson Matchup & Impact Forecast
lede: Evaluating Jalen Brunson's recent behaviour on the court to forecast his scoring band and analyse the Knicks' likelihood of winning their next fixture.

sections.title: Historical Win Likelihood
sections.description: How the Knicks perform based on Brunson's scoring output.

sections.title: Recent Form
sections.description: Brunson's points tally across his last 5 matches to contextualise the forecast.

sections.title: Forecast Logic Context
sections.description: The variables used to determine the 28–32 points forecast.
items: Baseline established from the last 10 matches (31.2 pts average)
Adjusted for Away venue, historically reducing output by 1.5 pts
Opponent defensive rating (BOS) factored as high resistance

demoSteps: Review the primary highlights to see the forecasted band and immediate win probability.
Analyse the historical table to understand how heavily the Knicks rely on Brunson exceeding 30 points.
Check the recent form series to visually verify the forecast against his actual recent behaviour.
Read the logic context list to ensure transparency in how the forecast was generated.
notes: Ensure UK English spelling (e.g., behaviour, analyse, contextualise) is preserved in the UI.
Maintain a clean layout without extra charts; rely on the simple series and table for data presentation.
